title: meliosma simplicifolia subsp. fordii
intro: Meliosma simplicifolia subsp. fordii, also known as Ford's meliosma, is a plant species belonging to the family Sabiaceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, in addition to its potential in treating various diseases including cancer. Various herbal preparations of Ford's meliosma include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
